prompt: A woman, firm e cup, with gently curved eyebrows and a warm, sweet smile wears a pale ivory-pink sheer blouse. It features delicate vertical stripes and a soft sheen, with a thin black ribbon at the collar. Charcoal gray high-waisted shorts, barefoot, with black patent leather platform heels. Her legs extend diagonally toward the lower left of the frame, with her ankles naturally close together. On the right side of the frame, her arm hangs naturally back from the side of her body, elbow slightly bent. The base of her palm rests on a yellow horizontal tube, palm facing down. Her four fingers are aligned together, moving along the curve of the tube, with fingertips slightly curved to touch the tube's surface. Her thumb wraps around to the other side of the tube, not gripping tightly, lightly supporting part of her body weight. Her other hand is hidden behind her body, out of sight. Natural light falls diagonally from the right front—soft, bright afternoon sunlight over a pastoral ranch. The background is a rural ranch scene—white wooden fencing, a few oak trees scattered in the distance, a corner of a red barn, and rolling green hills under a blue sky with white clouds. Medium shot, eye-level perspective.
promptEn: A woman, firm e cup, with gently curved eyebrows and a warm, sweet smile wears a pale ivory-pink sheer blouse. It features delicate vertical stripes and a soft sheen, with a thin black ribbon at the collar. Charcoal gray high-waisted shorts, barefoot, with black patent leather platform heels. Her legs extend diagonally toward the lower left of the frame, with her ankles naturally close together. On the right side of the frame, her arm hangs naturally back from the side of her body, elbow slightly bent. The base of her palm rests on a yellow horizontal tube, palm facing down. Her four fingers are aligned together, moving along the curve of the tube, with fingertips slightly curved to touch the tube's surface. Her thumb wraps around to the other side of the tube, not gripping tightly, lightly supporting part of her body weight. Her other hand is hidden behind her body, out of sight. Natural light falls diagonally from the right front—soft, bright afternoon sunlight over a pastoral ranch. The background is a rural ranch scene—white wooden fencing, a few oak trees scattered in the distance, a corner of a red barn, and rolling green hills under a blue sky with white clouds. Medium shot, eye-level perspective.
promptZh: 一位女性，身材丰满，眉毛微弯，带着温暖甜美的笑容，身穿 淡象牙粉色透视 衬衫。衬衫带有精致的竖条纹和柔和的光泽，领口系着一条细黑丝带。炭灰色高腰短裤，赤脚，穿着黑色漆皮厚底高跟鞋。她的双腿向画面左下方斜向延伸，脚踝自然并拢。在画面右侧，她的手臂从身体一侧自然下垂，手肘微屈。手掌根部支撑在一根黄色的水平管状物上，掌心向下。四根手指并拢，沿着管子的弧度移动，指尖微曲触碰管子表面。大拇指绕到管子的另一侧，没有用力抓握，而是轻柔地支撑着部分身体重量。另一只手隐藏在身后，不可见。自然光从右前方斜射而来——柔和明亮的午后阳光洒在 田园牧场 上。背景为乡村牧场场景——白色木栅栏、远处零星的橡树、红谷仓的一角，以及蓝天白云下起伏的绿色山丘。中景，平视视角。
